In @deployment/docker/entrypoint.sh around lines 9 - 12, Update the GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD assignment in the GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD_FILE block to remove only the final optional CRLF line ending, preserving all password spaces and tabs, including trailing whitespace. Keep the existing export behavior unchanged.
suggestions:
if [ -n "${GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD_FILE:-}" ]; then
  GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD="$(sed -e 's/\r$//' "${GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD_FILE}")"
  export GLACIER_SMTP_PASSWORD
fi
